docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,875.00 FILED BY DUSAY, KATHERINE M. AS TO DEFENDANT COPELAND, TOM   C/O  WILLIAM STERLING COPELAND, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COPELAND, TOM   C/O  WILLIAM STERLING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COPELAND, JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-18-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-12-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF TO PROPERLY SERVE DEFT TOM COPELAND & TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.DEFT JOHN COPELAND APPEARED & WAIVED DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE.
PLTF'S CONT.REQUEST FRWRDED.TO 506; DID NOT SUBMIT FEES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUSAY, KATHERINE M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COPELAND, TOM   C/O  WILLIAM STERLING COPELAND, JOHN PLFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED NOT PROPERLY NOTICED. DISM WITHOUT PREJUDICE DEFT. TOM COPELAND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
